extension.description: Unified plugin: Skin Installer, Skin Switcher, Userdata Backup & Restore, OpenWizard, and ABUKARIM Wizard.
extension.news: v1.7.3.1 - Removed all script.tinyppi patch entries: the AF3 font remap (TinyPPI 1.6.1.1 now manages its own Noto fonts via tools.tinyppi) and the set_ui_position crash fixes + CpuTopUsageVar paren fix (both fixed upstream in 1.6.1; old code paths no longer exist). v1.7.3 - AUTOSTART SELF-EDIT FIX: autostart.sh's guisettings-restore block no longer removes itself via sed -i on its own file — rewriting a running shell script's own file mid-read is unsafe on BusyBox ash and could corrupt/delete autostart.sh outright. Cleanup now happens from service.py on the next Kodi start instead (a separate, already-exited process by that point, so it's safe). - OE_SETTINGS.XML RESTORE: the autostart restore now also stages and restores /storage/.kodi/userdata/addon_data/service.coreelec.settings/oe_settings.xml, not just guisettings.xml. CoreELEC's own settings service re-syncs its remembered audiooutput.audiodevice etc. from oe_settings.xml back over guisettings.xml during the session, so restoring guisettings.xml alone didn't stick — a stale device value in oe_settings.xml (e.g. a dev-machine placeholder) kept reappearing every boot regardless. v1.7.1 - DUAL-FORK FREEZE FIX (boot reconcile): service.py now enforces the one-TMDbHelper-fork-live rule on EVERY boot, not just on a skin switch. Reads the current skin and runs the switcher's synchronous fork toggle, so the inactive fork (stock vs Bingie) is disabled before any playback. Closes the gap where a normal boot — or a restore re-enabling a fork — left both live, causing the onAVChange double-crash and CPythonInvoker thread storm. v1.6.9.11 - Bingie helper Trakt QR FIX: corrected fork paths to resources/tmdbbingiehelper/lib/api/trakt/ (authenticator.py + qr_utils.py) and poller import to tmdbbingiehelper.lib... — the fork renames the package root to tmdbbingiehelper, so the stock tmdbhelper path was 'target not found'. v1.6.9.10 - TMDbHelper/Bingie Trakt QR ROOT-CAUSE FIX: QR window injected to resources/skins/Default (capital D) and dialog now loads from 'Default' — was lowercase 'default', which works on macOS but NOT on case-sensitive CoreELEC, so the device silently fell back to the stock code+URL dialog (no QR). v1.6.9.9 - TMDbHelper Trakt QR: poller patch now has a version-resilient regex fallback (re-applies after TMDbHelper updates / reinstalls; was silently reverting to the stock code+URL dialog). - Bingie helper (plugin.video.tmdb.bingie.helper): full Trakt QR auth ported (qr_utils.py, trakt_auth_qr.xml, authenticator.py poller swap), addon-id-corrected. v1.6.9.8 - Skin Installer: installing skin.bingie disables stock TMDbHelper & enables Bingie helper fork; installing any other skin does the reverse. v1.6.9.7 - Backup Manager: exclude plugin.video.tmdb.bingie.helper and script.autoruns from backups (added to OpenWizard EXCLUDES). v1.6.9.6 - Skin Switcher: skin.bingie disables stock TMDbHelper & enables Bingie helper fork; any other skin does the reverse. v1.6.9.5 - Removed Umbrella player deploy entry from patcher. v1.6.9.4 - TMDbHelper: patch pins max_threads=3 in addon_data settings.xml (caps CPythonInvoker storm causing UI freeze on AM6B; survives restore). v1.6.9.3 - RedLight: patch kills volume_checker (was forcing SetVolume() and dropping playback volume ~30%). v1.6.9.0 - First-run: CoreELEC reboot prompt 10s after skin loads (YES reboots so autostart.sh runs). v1.6.8.9 - Auto-run first-run on new build apply via shipped resources/build.id (wipe-proof self-trigger). - Re-enabled xbmc.service so first-run triggers automatically on boot. v1.6.8.8 - Skin installer (first-run + manual): auto-confirm YES on the final "Keep this skin?" dialog. v1.6.8.7 - Removed AF3 ColorHighlight patch entry. v1.6.8.6 - POV/Umbrella players switched to RunPlugin (search-mode caused GetDirectory loop). All 4 players now consistent. v1.6.8.5 - Patcher: addon_data target support. Deploy 4 TMDbHelper player JSONs (POV/Umbrella search-mode) post-restore. v1.6.8.4 - TMDbHelper: suppress "not playable" popup for source-select players (dummy strm-gate fix). v1.6.8.3 - RedLight sources_results: dark unfocused card (FF1F2020) - fixes white rows in TIDB results window. v1.6.8.2 - AF3: dark focus highlight (ff202020) fixes white select-dialog rows (TIDB/Seren etc). v1.6.6 - Removed all RedLight patch entries and theme-reset logic.
